cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the question is about Jane's birthday and calculating a date 10 days before her 16th birthday. Let me break it down step by step. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Wait, February's last day is usually the 28th, except in a leap year when it's the 29th. But 2001 isn't a leap year, right? Leap years are divisible by 4, but 2001 divided by 4 is 500.25, so no. So her birthday is February 28, 2001. Today is her 16th birthday. So that would be 16 years after her birthdate.
